concepts.name: XXSim Unreal Project
concepts.definition: Unreal Engine simulation project rooted at Develop/BYSim.uproject, combining the BYSim game module with core runtime, editor, and third-party plugins.
concepts.boundary: Project module/plugin composition, target files, Unreal project configuration, and top-level simulation application ownership.

concepts.name: BYSim Game Shell
concepts.definition: Project game module that binds game instance, game mode, player controllers, and user widgets to the shared BYC simulation platform.
concepts.boundary: BYSim-specific UGameInstance, game mode, controller, password/license startup behavior, and project widgets.

concepts.name: BYC Simulation Platform
concepts.definition: Core simulation plugin family that provides runtime actors, SDK entities, managers, ECS migration support, UI utilities, and editor tooling.
concepts.boundary: Develop/Plugins/Core/BYC runtime, BYCSDK simulation SDK, BYCEditor editor extensions, and GraphPlotter support code.

concepts.name: Simulation Entity
concepts.definition: Runtime simulated object with identity, camp/type metadata, transform, sensors, weapons, damage state, movement, children, tasks, commands, and lifecycle hooks.
concepts.boundary: BSEntity composition model and IUnit/actor-facing unit behavior; excludes ECS entity IDs used only inside ECS storage.

concepts.name: Entity Lifecycle Manager
concepts.definition: Manager responsible for creating, destroying, finding, iterating, pooling, serializing, and broadcasting lifecycle events for simulation entities.
concepts.boundary: TMM_EntityMgr entity creation functions, entity pools, waiting-for-destroy lists, spawn history, tick hooks, and entity lifecycle delegates.

concepts.name: Simulation Manager Singletons
concepts.definition: Thread-message-manager based singleton service layer for simulation subsystems such as scenario, time, entities, missions, weapons, sensors, networking, HLA, and replay.
concepts.boundary: TMM_* manager classes under BYCSDK/Public/Managers and their Initialize/Deinitialize/tick/message responsibilities.

concepts.name: Scenario Lifecycle
concepts.definition: Lifecycle of scenario data from creation, load, change marking, save, reload, level opening, and close.
concepts.boundary: Scenario file current path, scenario metadata, load/save/close operations, begin/post open delegates, and scenario file events.

concepts.name: Replay Recording
concepts.definition: Frame-based simulation recording workflow that captures replay events and snapshots while moving through stop, recording, and pause states.
concepts.boundary: Replay recorder state, frame duration, snapshot interval, replay file writes, and PUSH_REPLAY_EVENT event creation.

concepts.name: Data Model Schema
concepts.definition: Typed simulation data model represented by MouldX/MouldT C++ types and generated Proto tables for units, weapons, sensors, rules, formations, weather, countries, and related records.
concepts.boundary: Data declarations and generated protobuf-backed records, not runtime managers that execute behavior from those records.

concepts.name: Database Editor Workflow
concepts.definition: Project UI workflow for inspecting and saving custom unit, aircraft, ship, ground, mount, power, radar, signature, and buffer data.
concepts.boundary: BYSim DatabaseEditor widget operations and its interaction with unit proto/custom data; excludes generic property editing in the Mod plugin.

concepts.name: ECS World
concepts.definition: Runtime ECS container that owns ECS entity IDs, component working memory, system registration/execution, scheduler, diagnostics, and backend service hooks.
concepts.boundary: ECSWorld lifecycle, tick, component manager, entity manager, system manager, scheduler, diagnostics entity, backend physics service, and line-trace query service.

concepts.name: ECS Entity
concepts.definition: Opaque entity ID used inside ECS storage to attach typed component arrays and participate in systems.
concepts.boundary: EntityID creation, registration, validity, destruction, and active entity count in ECSEntityManager; distinct from domain Simulation Entity.

concepts.name: ECS Component
concepts.definition: Typed data attached to ECS entities, stored in component arrays and accessed through registered type IDs.
concepts.boundary: ECSComponentManager, ComponentArray storage, registered component types, add/remove/get/has semantics, and USTRUCT component declarations.

concepts.name: ECS System
concepts.definition: Registered ECS behavior unit scheduled in execution phases/groups to read and write components during world ticks.
concepts.boundary: ECSSystem subclasses, ECSSystemManager registration, execution pipeline rebuilds, init/shutdown, and update phases.

concepts.name: ECS Legacy Bridge
concepts.definition: Migration boundary that keeps legacy BSEntity objects and ECS entity IDs synchronized while both runtime models coexist.
concepts.boundary: BSEntity-to-ECS mappings, UID lookups, binding updates, borrowed pointer snapshots, and sync binding registries.

concepts.name: ECS Frontend Sync
concepts.definition: Frontend-facing ECS snapshot and event synchronization layer used to expose backend component state without direct mutable access.
concepts.boundary: Frontend state store, event queue, component snapshot sinks, component data maps, and message-hub snapshot propagation.

concepts.name: Entity Transform Authority
concepts.definition: Authority model deciding whether unit transform state comes from ECS, actor-only exceptions, bootstrap cache, compatibility wrappers, or presentation-only views.
concepts.boundary: EUnitTransformAuthorityMode and IUnit transform APIs for LLH/Euler/cache/actor transform behavior.

concepts.name: Backend Physics Service
concepts.definition: Interface between ECS simulation systems and the backend physics implementation for body sync, pose commands, stepping, collision loading, and body reads.
concepts.boundary: IECSBackendPhysicsService inputs/results and ECS backend physics systems/components; excludes concrete physics library internals.

concepts.name: Movement Simulation
concepts.definition: Simulation behavior for movement intent, velocity, orientation intent/control, vehicle/character movement state, fuel/battery/engine consumption, and physics-backed movement.
concepts.boundary: ECS simulation components and systems plus legacy unit movement APIs; excludes navigation pathfinding and weapon aiming.

concepts.name: Sensor Domain
concepts.definition: Domain model for sensor contacts and sensor tasks, including detected/recognized levels and task phases such as requested, running, succeeded, lost, cancelled, and failed.
concepts.boundary: Sensor contact/task ECS data, state components, delta components, seed/update systems, and legacy event bridging for contacts/tasks.

concepts.name: Sensor Visibility Pipeline
concepts.definition: ECS sensor perception pipeline that builds visibility candidates and requests, performs line-trace/visibility queries, resolves observations, and emits debug data.
concepts.boundary: Sensor visibility components, electro-optical environment, request/query/observation/debug systems, resolver, probe filter, and line-trace query service.

concepts.name: Weapon And Ammo Domain
concepts.definition: Combat subsystem around weapons, ammo, launch requests, aiming, mounts, ammo counts, guided/unguided ammo, mines, missiles, sonobuoys, and related attack commands.
concepts.boundary: Weapon/ammo runtime components, BYCSDK weapon classes, mount plan composition, launch and attack APIs; excludes sensor contact creation.

concepts.name: Cesium Backend Navigation
concepts.definition: Runtime navigation service backed by cooked Cesium/offline backend navigation manifests and tile data for nearest-point, path, cache, and debug queries.
concepts.boundary: CesiumNavigation plugin BackendNav loader, manifest, geometry/debug tile data, query status, nearest-point/path requests, cache invalidation, and level context.

concepts.name: Backend Map Data Cook
concepts.definition: Editor/offline workflow that exports world collision geometry and cooks backend navigation data plus manifests for runtime loading.
concepts.boundary: BYCEditor backend map data cooker, backend nav geometry exporter, cook settings, artifact path generation, and Cesium backend nav cook config/result.

concepts.name: Player Brain Integration
concepts.definition: gRPC/protobuf integration layer for external player brain actions, observations, request/response conversion, message routing, and recording hooks.
concepts.boundary: PlayerBrain setup/run/step/stop, action factory, brain recorder, gRPC server, protobuf entity copy helpers, and client/server message queues.

concepts.name: Mod Runtime Resource System
concepts.definition: Runtime mod resource layer for synchronous/asynchronous asset loading, package loading, pak mounting, load cancellation, and loaded asset caching.
concepts.boundary: ModResourceManager asset/package/pak APIs, mounted pak reference cache, streamable handles, package callbacks, and loaded asset cache.

concepts.name: Editable Entity Property Model
concepts.definition: Reflection-based editable property model for actors/entities, property lists, JSON-wrapped property items, and global category groupings.
concepts.boundary: EditableEntityComponent property discovery and Mod Toolkit property parser/category creation; excludes BYSim DatabaseEditor custom unit persistence.

concepts.name: Runtime UI Widget System
concepts.definition: BYC runtime UI foundation for window management, widget style assets, custom BY widgets, value widgets, top boards, popups, timelines, and unit-detail panels.
concepts.boundary: BYC/Public/Widgets and WindowManager runtime UI classes, widget style asset manager, widget manager, and project widgets; excludes editor-only customization widgets.

concepts.name: Custom Socket Seat Editor
concepts.definition: Editor tool for static mesh sockets and seat maps, including custom viewport preview, static mesh selection, seat preview components, and asset factory integration.
concepts.boundary: CustomSocketEditor plugin editor widgets, seat socket/seat map editing, preview components, and editor tab/toolkit lifecycle.

concepts.name: Postprocessor Rendering
concepts.definition: Rendering plugin that maps shader sources and injects post-resolve/post-opaque render callbacks for SDF ranges, line-of-sight buffers, heat-map output, and damage-degree visualization.
concepts.boundary: PostProcessor module startup/shutdown, renderer delegates, compute shader parameters, SDF/detection/ammo range models, LOS buffers, and post-process actor setup.

concepts.name: Command Line Variable System
concepts.definition: Cross-cutting configuration helper that binds command-line values to console variables and exports generated command-line help.
concepts.boundary: TCommandLineVariable parsing, platform effectiveness, console variable updates, help collection, and CommandLineHelp.txt export.

concepts.name: Backend Debug Observability
concepts.definition: ECS-backed debug catalog, debug primitive, system-control, navigation debug, sensor visibility debug, and ECS system status visibility layer.
concepts.boundary: Debug ECS components/systems, diagnostics entity, backend debug registry/catalog, debug primitive batches, and viewer/editor widgets for ECS data/system status.

rejected_terms.reason: Alias/module boundary for BYC Simulation Platform unless discussing SDK packaging specifically.
Naming pattern for many singleton managers; individual managers need behavior evidence before becoming separate concepts.
Most are implementation-level component records; grouped under ECS Component until a domain responsibility is stable.
External implementation dependencies, not project-owned concepts unless wrapped by a project boundary.

missing_or_review_required.reason: Task and mission files are visible, but lifecycle, ownership, and relationship to Scenario Lifecycle need more source reading.
Managers exist, but domain invariants and canonical boundaries were not validated in this pass.
Manager and data-link classes exist; protocol and ownership boundaries need targeted review.
Runtime classes exist, but behavior ownership needs additional evidence.
